purpose: Record external tool outputs for rule validation. Fill this file from WenZhen Bazi / Bazi Cece screenshots or manual results.

tools.name: 八字测测专业版
tools.accessNote: Screenshot samples received on 2026-05-10. The app requires a birthplace and displays the chart using true solar time.

requiredSettingsToRecord: true solar time: on or off
late zi hour / night zi hour option if available
gender if the tool requires it

cases.goal: Confirm whether 23:00 is treated as next day or same day.

wenzhen-bazi.method: Chrome UI confirmed the form and frontend API getbasebz8.php was used for repeatable extraction.

toolInputSettings.note: The input standard time is 23:00, but the app converts it to 22:31 true solar time for Beijing Dongcheng, so this sample does not enter zi hour after true solar time adjustment.
